tools.notes: System-level tool. Not per-project. Managed by Contract Admin. Clauses from this tool are pulled into D2.2 for every project. Maps to a contract_clauses table, not tool_instances.

sections.title: Standard Legal Clauses
sections.description: Boilerplate clauses. Do not alter without executive approval. These populate D2.2 variable slots.

sections.title: Standard Appendices
sections.description: These must be attached to every D2.2 draft

fields.name: standard_appendices
fields.label: Required Appendices
items: Appendix A: D1.15 Project Brief & Draft Budget
Appendix B: D1.13 Scope of Work (Exclusions)
Appendix C: D1.11 Risk Mitigation Directives
Appendix D: IMHOGEN Standard Service Level Agreement (SLA)

sections.title: Core Contract Variables
sections.description: Fill-in-the-blanks that map into the D2.1 boilerplate clauses

columns.name: value_input
columns.label: Value / Input to Map into Contract

sections.title: Project-Specific Legal Directives
sections.description: Extracted from D1.16 Handoff — risk clauses that must be added to this contract

columns.name: specific_clause_added
columns.label: Specific Clause Added to Draft Contract

fields.name: appendix_verification
fields.label: Required Attachments
items: Appendix A: D1.15 Project Brief & Draft Budget
Appendix B: D1.13 Scope of Work (Exclusions)
Appendix C: IMHOGEN Standard SLA

tools.notes: Replaces D2.2 for Tier 3 projects. Handles IP election and liability waiver specific to drafting/reverse engineering work.

fields.name: ip_election
fields.label: IP Option Selected
options: Standard Release — IMHOGEN retains Native CAD; Client receives PDF / STEP only
Full IP Transfer — Client purchases Native Source Files (CAD Assets)

fields.name: ip_transfer_fee_ghs
fields.label: IP Transfer Fee (GHS) — if Full IP Transfer selected

fields.name: liability_waiver_acknowledgements
fields.label: Client Acknowledgements
items: The Client acknowledges that IMHOGEN is modeling based on PROVIDED DATA.
IMHOGEN is not responsible for fitment issues arising from inaccuracies in the client's original source model or measurements.

fields.name: next_step_directive
fields.label: Next Step Directive
options: Return to Contract Admin for Edits

fields.name: value_verification
fields.label: Financial Accuracy Check
prefilled_rows: Currency and Tax (VAT / WHT) clearly stated

fields.name: payment_schedule_verification
fields.label: Cash Flow Safety Check
prefilled_rows: Invoice payment terms stated (e.g. Net 21 Days)

fields.name: financial_risk_clauses
fields.label: Risk Protection Check
prefilled_rows: Quote Validity Period (e.g. 21 days due to material pricing)
Termination Liability (client pays for hours / BOM if cancelled)

fields.name: next_step_directive
fields.label: Next Step Directive
options: Return to Contract Admin for Edits

fields.name: departmental_signoffs
fields.label: Sign-Off Checklist
items: PM Operational Approval (D2.3) complete and attached
Finance Commercial Approval (D2.4) complete and attached
All requested edits from PM and Finance applied to current draft

fields.name: strategic_alignment
fields.label: Does this project align with IMHOGEN's long-term strategic objectives?

tools.notes: Creates the immutable baseline — the walk-away limits used during negotiation. Must not be edited after lock.

sections.title: Immutable Baseline Record
sections.description: Pre-negotiation values and absolute walk-away limits. Read-only once locked.

sections.title: Document Conversion & Archive
sections.description: Lock the draft as a static PDF before transmitting to client

fields.name: conversion_checklist
fields.label: PDF Lock Tasks
items: Has the contract draft been exported as a static, non-editable PDF?
Is the locked PDF named per standard convention (e.g. IMHO_Contract_V1_ClientName)?
Is the locked PDF saved in the permanent client folder?

fields.name: baseline_locked
fields.label: Baseline Locked and Ready for Transmittal (D2.7)?

tools.notes: Dispatch log for sending the locked PDF to the client. initial_client_response drives the conditional path: 'Accepted as-is' skips D2.8-D2.10 and goes to D2.11; 'Requested Negotiation' routes through D2.8 → D2.9 → D2.10.

sections.title: Standard Transmittal Email Script
sections.description: Copy and paste to send to client

fields.name: transmittal_script
fields.label: Email Script
fields.content:
Dear [Client Name],

Following our discussions and the approved Project Brief, please find attached the Draft Engineering Services Agreement for [Project Name].

This document outlines the formal technical scope and payment schedules we have agreed upon. We encourage you and your legal team to review the terms carefully. Due to current fluctuations in material supply chains, please note that this quote is valid for [X] days from the date of this email.

If the terms meet your expectations, we are happy to schedule a brief alignment meeting.

We look forward to officially kicking off this phase of engineering.

Best regards,
[Your Name] | IMHOGEN LTD

tools.condition: Only unlocked if D2.7 initial_client_response = 'Requested Negotiation'. Skip to D2.11 if client accepted as-is.

fields.name: imhogen_hard_limits
fields.label: IMHOGEN Hard Limits (from D2.6 walk-away points)

fields.name: invite_script
fields.label: Meeting Invite Script
fields.content:
Dear [Client Name],

Thank you for reviewing the Draft Engineering Services Agreement for [Project Name]. We appreciate your feedback regarding [Insert 1-2 words on their concern].

To ensure we are perfectly aligned and to finalize the terms efficiently, we would like to schedule a brief 30-minute Contract Alignment Meeting with our Lead Project Manager and Engineering Director.

Please let us know if [Proposed Date & Time] works for your team. Our proposed agenda is as follows:
1. Review of requested amendments to the Draft Contract.
2. Discussion of operational / timeline impacts.
3. Finalizing terms for the Pending Signature Draft.

We look forward to a productive discussion.

Best regards,
[Your Name] | IMHOGEN LTD

tools.condition: Only unlocked if D2.7 initial_client_response = 'Requested Negotiation'.

fields.name: meeting_outcome
fields.label: Meeting Outcome
options: Deadlock — escalate to Head of R&D

tools.condition: Only unlocked if D2.7 initial_client_response = 'Requested Negotiation' and D2.9 meeting_outcome = 'Terms Agreed'.

sections.title: Negotiation Amendment Tracker
sections.description: Every concession from D2.9 must be logged here before the contract is finalized

sections.title: Financial Re-Verification
sections.description: Required only if pricing changed during negotiation

fields.name: overhead_still_met
fields.label: Is minimum overhead recovery still met at new price?

fields.name: final_pdf_lock_checklist
fields.label: Final PDF Lock Tasks
items: Has the finalized contract been exported as the FINAL static PDF?
Is the locked PDF named per standard convention (e.g. IMHO_FinalContract_ClientName)?

fields.name: contract_finalized
fields.label: Contract Finalized and Ready for Signature Routing (D2.11)?

tools.notes: Unlocked either directly from D2.7 (accepted as-is) or from D2.10 (post-negotiation). This is where DocuSign or physical signing happens.

fields.name: signature_request_script
fields.label: Signature Request Script
fields.content:
Dear [Client Name],

Thank you for a highly productive alignment meeting. We have updated the Engineering Services Agreement to reflect the exact terms we agreed upon.

Please find the finalized contract attached for your signature. [If using DocuSign: 'You can click the link below to review and sign the document digitally.']

Once executed by both parties, our Finance team will issue the invoice for the advance payment, and our Engineering team will formally initiate Phase 1.

We are excited to begin this development journey with you.

Best regards,
[Your Name] | IMHOGEN LTD

fields.name: pending_over_7_days
fields.label: Has the contract been pending signature for more than 7 days?

sections.title: Initial Financial Trigger
sections.description: Triggers Finance to generate the advance payment invoice

fields.name: financial_trigger_checklist
fields.label: Financial Trigger Tasks
items: Has the executed contract been emailed to the Finance Department?
Has Finance generated and issued the Advance Payment Invoice?

fields.name: contract_executed_and_invoice_sent
fields.label: Is the contract fully executed and the first invoice sent?

fields.name: vault_checklist
fields.label: Required Documents in Vault
items: D1.15 Project Brief & Draft Budget (IMHO_Brief_ClientName.pdf)
D2.6 Internally Approved Draft / Baseline (IMHO_Contract_V1_ClientName.pdf)
D2.9 Negotiation Meeting Notes (IMHO_NegNotes_ClientName.pdf)
D2.12 Fully Executed Contract PDF (IMHO_ExecutedContract_ClientName.pdf)
Digital Audit Certificate (IMHO_AuditCert_ClientName.pdf)

fields.name: all_documents_in_vault
fields.label: Are all documents present in the secure cloud vault?

tools.notes: This is the trigger that unlocks WB03 (Finance & Resource Management). Completing the financial clearance section sets projects.advance_cleared = true and projects.status = 'Active Engineering Phase'.

sections.title: Financial Clearance
sections.description: The advance payment must be confirmed cleared before engineering work begins. Triggers projects.advance_cleared = true.

fields.name: date_payment_cleared
fields.label: Date Payment Cleared IMHOGEN Bank Account

fields.name: link_to_executed_contract
fields.label: Link to Executed Contract (For PM Reference)

fields.name: launch_checklist
fields.label: Launch Tasks
items: Has the central tracking database been updated to 'Active Engineering Phase'?
Has the Project Manager formally received this Initiation Notice?

fields.name: engineering_team_authorized
fields.label: Is the Engineering Team officially authorized to begin billable work?
